auth.label: API Key
auth.description: AgentMail API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the AgentMail Console API Keys section.

actions.name: batch_get_messages
actions.description: Fetch multiple messages from a specific AgentMail inbox by message ID.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for fetching multiple AgentMail messages.

outputSchema.description: Response returned when batch-fetching AgentMail messages.

actions.name: create_api_key
actions.description: Create an AgentMail API key.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail API key.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after creating an AgentMail API key.

actions.name: create_domain
actions.description: Create an AgentMail domain.

domain.description: Domain name to add to AgentMail.

feedback_enabled.description: Whether bounce and complaint notifications are sent to inboxes.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail domain.

outputSchema.description: AgentMail domain response.

actions.name: create_draft
actions.description: Create a draft in a specific AgentMail inbox.

labels.description: Labels used to filter or apply to a record.

reply_to.description: Email address or email address list.

to.description: Email address or email address list.

cc.description: Email address or email address list.

bcc.description: Email address or email address list.

text.description: Plain text body of the draft.

url.description: URL where AgentMail can fetch the attachment.

items.description: Attachment to include in an AgentMail message or draft.

attachments.description: Attachments to include in the draft.

send_at.description: Time at which AgentMail should schedule the draft to send.

client_id.description: Client-side identifier associated with the draft.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail draft.

outputSchema.description: AgentMail draft response.

actions.name: create_inbox
actions.description: Create a new AgentMail inbox.

username.description: Inbox username. AgentMail generates one when omitted.

domain.description: Verified domain used by the inbox. Defaults to agentmail.to.

display_name.description: Display name shown for the inbox.

client_id.description: Client-side identifier associated with the inbox.

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the inbox.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail inbox.

display_name.description: Display name shown for the inbox.

client_id.description: Client identifier associated with the inbox.

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the inbox.

outputSchema.description: AgentMail inbox.

actions.name: create_inbox_api_key
actions.description: Create an API key scoped to a specific AgentMail inbox.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail inbox API key.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after creating an AgentMail inbox API key.

actions.name: create_inbox_list_entry
actions.description: Create an allow or block list entry scoped to a specific AgentMail inbox.

entry.description: The email address or domain list entry.

reason.description: Reason for adding the list entry.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail inbox list entry.

outputSchema.description: AgentMail inbox list entry response.

actions.name: create_list_entry
actions.description: Create a global AgentMail allow or block list entry.

entry.description: The email address or domain list entry.

reason.description: Reason for adding the list entry.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating an AgentMail list entry.

outputSchema.description: AgentMail list entry response.

actions.description: Create an AgentMail pod.

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.description: Create an AgentMail webhook.

actions.name: forward_message
actions.description: Forward a specific AgentMail message.

labels.description: Labels used to filter or apply to a record.

reply_to.description: Email address or email address list.

to.description: Email address or email address list.

cc.description: Email address or email address list.

bcc.description: Email address or email address list.

subject.description: Subject line of the forwarded message.

text.description: Plain text body of the forwarded message.

html.description: HTML body of the forwarded message.

url.description: URL where AgentMail can fetch the attachment.

items.description: Attachment to include in an AgentMail message or draft.

attachments.description: Attachments to include in the forwarded message.

headers.description: Custom message headers to include in the outbound message.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for forwarding an AgentMail message.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after sending an AgentMail message.

ascending.description: Whether results should be sorted in ascending timestamp order.

include_spam.description: Whether spam threads should be included in the result.

include_blocked.description: Whether blocked threads should be included in the result.

include_unauthenticated.description: Whether unauthenticated threads should be included in the result.

include_trash.description: Whether trash threads should be included in the result.

senders.description: Sender addresses used to filter threads.

recipients.description: Recipient addresses used to filter threads.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing AgentMail threads.

outputSchema.description: Response returned when listing AgentMail threads.
